children.name: hwPtpEnable
children.description: Enable PTP function.

children.name: hwPtpSetPortStateEnable
children.description: Enable PTP set port state function.

children.name: hwPtpAdaptiveRemoteServer2NegoState
children.description: Ptp adaptive device's remote server2 negotiate state.

children.name: hwPtpDfxACRMaxPdCur
children.description: The object indicates the current value of maximum forward path delay during adaptive 1588v2 synchronization. The default value is 0, in ns.

children.name: hwPtpAdaptiveForwardMode
children.description: Ptp adaptive device's forward mode.  Default value is init(99).

children.name: hwPtpDfxACRMinPdMean
children.description: This object indicates the average value of minimum forward path delay within the specified period during adaptive 1588v2 synchronization. The default value is 0, in ns.

children.name: hwPtpDfxTimeSyncMPDlyCur
children.description: This object indicates the current value of the mean path delay during 1588v2 time synchronization. The default value is 0, in ns.

children.name: hwPtpAlarmThresholdOffsetSum
children.description: The alarm threshold of ptp time offset sum.

children.name: hwPtpTimeOffsetSumP2P
children.description: This object indicates the peak-to-peak value of time offsets.

children.name: hwPtpGrandMasterClockAccuracy
children.description: PTP GrandMaster clock accuracy attribute.

children.name: hwPtpDfxPhyPhaseSubMax
children.description: This object indicates the maximum value of the frequency offset in a specific time period during physical layer frequency synchronization. The default value is 0, in ns.

children.name: hwPtpBits1ppsReceiveDelay
children.description: Bits1ppsReceiveDelay.

children.name: hwPtpLocalClockAccuracy
children.description: PTP device's clock accuracy attribute.

children.name: hwPtpT4SubT3Value
children.description: This object indicates the negative delay (T4 minus T3).

children.name: hwPtpFrequencyRecoverMode
children.description: The recover mode of  PTP.

children.name: hwPtpT2SubT1ValueMean
children.description: This object indicates the average positive delay (average value of T2 minus T1).

children.name: hwPtpStandardTimeOffset
children.description: This object indicates the standard time offset.

children.name: hwPtpTimeOffsetSumEnd
children.description: This object indicates the final value of time offsets.

children.name: hwPtpBits1ppsSendDelay
children.description: Bits1ppsSendDelay.

children.name: hwPtpAdaptiveEnable
children.description: Enable ptp adaptive function dynamic mode.

children.name: hwPtpSlaveOnly
children.description: PTP device's SlaveOnly attribute.

children.name: hwPtpCurrentMasterClockReceivePort
children.description: The current grandmaster clock received from which port.

children.name: hwPtpDfxTimeSyncOffsetMin
children.description: This object indicates the minimum value of the clock offset in a specific time period during 1588v2 time synchronization. The default value is 0, in ns.

children.name: hwPtpPdvLimitExceedStatus
children.description: This object indicates whether the packet delay exceeds the threshold.

children.name: hwPtpDfxACRNegMinPdMin
children.description: This object indicates the minimum value in all minimum negative PDVs.

children.name: hwPtpT4SubT3ValueMean
children.description: This object indicates the average negative delay (average value of T4 minus T3).

children.name: hwPtpDfxACRMaxPdMin
children.description: This object indicates the minimum value of maximum forward path delay within the specified period during adaptive 1588v2 synchronization. The default value is 0, in ns.

children.name: hwPtpMaxStepsRemoved
children.description: The Max step removed.

children.name: hwPtpCurrentMasterClockStepRemoved
children.description: Steps between current grandmaster clock device and the local clock device.

children.name: hwPtpAdaptiveRemoteServer1Ip
children.description: Ptp adaptive device's remote server1 ip attribute.

children.name: hwPtpDfxPhyPhaseSubMin
children.description: This object indicates the minimum value of the frequency offset in a specific time period during physical layer frequency synchronization. The default value is 0, in ns.

children.name: hwPtpaVPortListTable
children.description: PtpaVPortListTable.

children.name: hwPtpaVPortListEntry
children.description: An entry in hwPtpaVPortListTable

children.name: hwPtpaVPortId
children.description: Ptp adaptive virtual port ID.

children.name: hwPtpChassisTable
children.description: PtpChassisTable.
